message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Tanh primitive

Adds 26 tests covering zero, positive/negative values, saturation at
large values, infinity handling, NaN, bounds (-1,1), odd function
property, monotonicity, small value approximation, and tensor shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
